From what I've observed, our current evolution engine is already impressively powerful, but there's always room for improvement. To take it to the next level, I think we need to explore some innovative strategies.

One idea could be to integrate more nuanced feedback mechanisms. Right now, we rely heavily on numerical fitness scores, which can sometimes feel a bit binary (i.e., an agent is either super fit or not).
